title: Button Item List
description: A comprehensive component system for rendering lists of button items with various interaction states, styling options, and organizational features. The Button Item List provides a container that manages multiple button items, handles their interactions, and supports both content projection and programmatic item creation.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-button-item-list with content projection

sections.title: With Items Array
sections.description: Use the items input to programmatically create button items from an array of data.

sections.title: Mixed Content
sections.description: Combine both content projection and items array for flexible button item lists.

sections.title: Color Variants
sections.description: Explore different color variants for button items using the color property.

sections.title: Selected State
sections.description: Demonstrate button items in selected state with dynamic selection management.

sections.title: With Dividers
sections.description: Demonstrate how dividers are automatically added between items when the divided property is set.

sections.title: Disabled State
sections.description: Show how the entire list can be disabled, affecting all child button items.

props.name: items
props.description: The list of button items to display programmatically.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onItemClick
events.description: Emits an event when an item is clicked. The event contains details about the clicked item.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Sets focus on the component element.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component element.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

props.name: text
props.description: Text displayed on the button item.

props.name: selected
props.description: Indicates whether the button item is selected.

props.name: divided
props.description: Whether the item is visually separated from other items.

props.name: data
props.description: Data associated with the button item.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the button item.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: color
props.description: Defines the color scheme of the component. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Fires each time the user clicks the button item.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color property changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
